reviews.author: R.MacLean
reviews.title: Good Story, Well Told -- a fresher and more nuanced post-apocalyptic tale
reviews.body: This book begins the story of a newly-retired businessman facing the aftermath of an EMP on his first day in a new neighborhood. His life as a trucker and business-owner, and his passion for post-apocalyptic fiction have prepared him well - or maybe not - for the growing chaos. Somehow, his not-always-expected approach to the dangers and challenges of the new environment are both fascinating and enlightening. As a voracious consumer of this genre, I found this book both refreshing and compelling.

reviews.author: KikiC
reviews.title: I'm hooked!
reviews.body: I have a problem! I am hooked! Love the characters, love the plot. On book 3 now and will have to start buying 2 at a time until the end, because I am devouring them so fast!

reviews.author: Liz
reviews.title: A 5-star series
reviews.body: I highly recommend this series. The story plot is creative, entertainment and action packed. The characters are perfect for this kind of situation. I am on book 3 and love every minute of it!

reviews.author: Ami A.
reviews.title: Excellent apocalyptic tale!
reviews.body: This is the second in what I HOPE will turn into a series of at least 10 books! Excellent characters give us near non-stop action.

reviews.author: Kindle Customer
reviews.title: Neighborhood watch
reviews.body: Wow! I'm loving this series! A great story line, well rounded characters. A neighborhood pulls together after an EMP, becoming a tight-knit community, led by one man who has prepared. Jump in! The reading's fantastic!

reviews.author: Taylor
reviews.title: Excellent read
reviews.body: I have been reading Post-Apocalyptical books for many years. This series really gets you thinking and living vicariously through the pages.

reviews.author: MMIrish1371
reviews.title: four books in and I can't get enough
reviews.body: Likable characters and fantastic storyline with great twist. A standup in the genre. I have no doubt that not only will I finish this series, I'll read everything by this author.

reviews.author: linda moses
reviews.title: Neighborhood Hood Watch/1000 Miles of Bad Road
reviews.body: Just started Book 5, and have finished 1000 Miles Of Bad Road. Should've started with Neighborhood Watch but no regrets. Both series keep you wanting more.

reviews.author: Del Hicks
reviews.title: Adrenaline rush
reviews.body: This series is nonstop action. Good characters, not your typical lead action hero. It's entertaining and fun to read. I highly recommend it.

reviews.author: zedlivesay
reviews.title: This Series Just Gets Better and Better
reviews.body: I am so hooked on this series. I definitely want to be in Frank's neighborhood if things go off the rails. I see myself in their community and wish I had been more prepared.

reviews.author: Sandra Fortenberry
reviews.title: This is why I read apocalypse books
reviews.body: I live these books all of them. Regular people trying to survive without losing their human dignity. People coming together as a community. This author writes like I would want to be able to prepare if I could.

reviews.author: Ellen Clason
reviews.title: And the story gets better with each new book
reviews.body: Each book starts at the end of the last book. No second guessing but it does not give a cut and copy of what happens in the previous book. Just when I think this author cannot top the last book, the next one proves me wrong.

reviews.author: Rallie
reviews.title: LOVE THIS SERIES!
reviews.body: This is one of my favorite series of all time! Great story line and character development has you invested by the first chapter. Cannot wait for the next one!

reviews.author: Steve Martin
reviews.title: A Great Read
reviews.body: I read apocalyptic books all the time. I'm a Prepper in Alaska. This series is the most realistic I've read. I love the characters and the story keeps you guessing.

reviews.author: Walt
reviews.title: Eight
reviews.body: Excellent adventure series with the full blown changes a fictional story can utilize in its telling. The pace is constant and the characters are real. This series is a must read for anyone who enjoys the genre.

reviews.author: Cindy Clark
reviews.title: Favorite author ever!!!
reviews.body: As always, this book did not disappoint. Totally engaging from the first word to the last. I don't dare even open one of these unless I have at least three days off because I won't put it down!

reviews.author: Christopher Haught
reviews.title: Wow is all I can say!
reviews.body: Another great book in the series! It's building up to the grand finale. Excitement, twists and turns and action galore! Can't wait for the final book to see what happens to Frank and his neighborhood watch!

reviews.author: Jesse R.
reviews.title: Great entertainment!
reviews.body: Most other post-apocalyptic stories are centered around some ex delta or special operations type character. It's so refreshing to read about an average Joe just using his wits to get by! I'm about to start the final book in the series.

reviews.author: Gerald
reviews.title: I read every book and they all get 5 stars!
reviews.body: I did in fact read all the books in this series. It was done in Florida where I was raised and as far as accurate goes, it's spot on research. The story was very well written and super entertaining. I enjoyed every minute with Clownfish Cove crew. This series will not let you down, read it, enjoy all of it.

reviews.author: Robert P. Rockhill
reviews.title: Wonderful Read
reviews.body: This is my favorite genre to read and this is probably my favorite series I've read. It's exciting and realistic and it's unique. It's the only one I've read that is about the suburbs most of us live in.
